task_completion.description: Verify that the facility 'PetroChem Laboratories' exists or is being created with a valid US address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a facility list showing 'PetroChem Laboratories' or a facility creation form filled out with the name 'PetroChem Laboratories' and a recognizable US address.

task_completion.description: Verify that a chemical record for 'Benzene' with CAS number '71-43-2' is being added to the facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chemical inventory or data entry screen showing 'Benzene' in the chemical name field and '71-43-2' in the CAS number field, associated with 'PetroChem Laboratories'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the NFPA 704 ratings are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the NFPA section or diamond on the form with the following values entered: Health = 2, Flammability = 3, and Instability/Reactivity = 0.

task_completion.description: Verify that the DOT/Shipping information is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the transportation or DOT/Shipping section with the following values entered: UN Number = 1114, Hazard Class = 3, and Packing Group = II.

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed chemical record has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message, a read-only summary view of the Benzene record, or Benzene appearing in the saved chemical inventory list for PetroChem Laboratories.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the CAMEO Data Manager application interface (or a web browser running it), not terminal windows, API testing tools, or database command lines.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like a functional database or management application, not a plain text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the task description into a text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data should be entered into the appropriate, specific form fields (e.g., separate fields for Health, Flammability, UN Number), rather than pasted as a single block of text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Benzene (CAS 71-43-2) requires NFPA 704 ratings: Health=2, Flammability=3, Instability=0. DOT transportation classification: UN Number=1114, Hazard Class=3, Packing Group=II.
